parsed_review.summary: CP00-604 is a descriptor-only client portal pack (RP19.P08.M03.S22-RP19.P08.M05.S19, 40 units, risk B). Verified full consistency across closeout-pack-plan.json, contracts/client-portal-core-contract.json, registry.js bindings, and the manifest: pack id, risk class, unit count, range, deliverable distribution (implementation=16, hermes_evidence=20, claude_review=2, test=2), and micro-phase counts (M03=1, M04=20, M05=19) all agree, and the contract current_pack deep-matches the registry CP604 binding the validator asserts on. All 7 required public exports exist (service.js + validators.js), and model.test.js covers coverage validation, descriptor-only row guards, and authority boundaries. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: no fs/network/db I/O in the client-portal source, freeze sets writes_product_state=false / no_real_data=true / emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, and no merge-conflict markers are present. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (claude_is_final_approval=false, read_only=true, tools=Read/Grep/Glob) and is not final approver; promotes_claude_to_final_approval and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation are both false. CP178+ review hardening is encoded in forbidden_review_evidence (failed auth, zero-byte, malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped output, missing references). Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic control-plane evidence-packet/receipt descriptors, not product runtime. The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly false (runtime_ready=false, status pending final closeout / human approval), so there is no over-claim to block. Verdict: PASS; does not block pack or goal closeout.

findings.title: Post-review artifacts not yet present (expected pending state)
findings.details: manifest evidence_refs and required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-604/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, which do not yet exist on disk. This is consistent with pack_level_claude_review.status="pending" and the hardened_review_sequence, which places finding_adjudication, construction_inspection, and final_closeout_validation after this read-only Claude review. It is not a defect in the implementation under review.
findings.recommendation: Ensure the post-review gated steps (review normalize/receipt validate, finding adjudication, construction inspection, final closeout validation, then closeout-pack:validate and git diff --check --cached) generate and validate these artifacts before commit, as the command-evidence notes already state.
